title: Daily Memo: Talks in Islamabad, Israeli Settlements
author: Geopolitical Futures
summary:
Trump’s declaration. U.S. ships, military personnel and weaponry will remain “in place, in and around Iran” until a peace deal is agreed to and complied with, President Donald Trump said in a social media post Wednesday. He also asserted that the two countries had previously agreed that Iran would stop pursuing nuclear weapons and open […]

Geopolitical Futures (GPF) was founded in 2015 by George Friedman, international strategist and author of The Storm Before the Calm and The Next 100 Years.
